case_title: NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2004-1 VS. EDEN MCLEAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION MICHAEL KAHN FILED RE: USE OF COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (EVID 1550 & CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2004-1 A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT & DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2004-1 A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S) AS TO DEFENDANT MCLEAN, EDEN DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2014

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2004-1 A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCLEAN, EDEN $19,913.38 PRINCIPAL, $437.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,350.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
